attributes.title: JJ-N Revenue Funnel
attributes.visState:
{"title":"JJ-N Revenue Funnel","type":"markdown","params":{"markdown":"# JJ-N Revenue Funnel

Use the `elastifund-nontrading-events*` data view with `event.dataset : "elastifund.nontrading"`.

Recommended funnel steps now covered in telemetry:
- `event.action : "account_researched"`
- `event.action : "approval_decision"`
- `event.action : "message_sent"`
- `event.action : "reply_received"`
- `event.action : "meeting_booked"`
- `event.action : "proposal_sent"`
- `event.action : "outcome_recorded"`
- `event.action : "fulfillment_status_changed"`
- `event.action : "cycle_complete"`

Use `labels.pipeline_stage` for grouping and `elastifund.event_alias` for namespaced labels in tables. Approval, fulfillment, and cycle summary events are now part of the verified Phase 0 event stream."},"aggs":[]}

attributes.title: JJ-N Daily Event Volume
attributes.visState:
{"title":"JJ-N Daily Event Volume","type":"markdown","params":{"markdown":"# JJ-N Daily Event Volume

Recommended Lens view:
- Date histogram on `@timestamp`
- Break down by `event.action`
- Filter: `event.dataset : "elastifund.nontrading"`

Useful splits:
- `labels.engine` to compare research, outreach, approval, fulfillment, and learning
- `event.outcome` to separate recorded, approved, rejected, blocked, and fulfillment states
- `labels.environment` to compare paper vs future shadow/live modes

This panel should make approval bursts, cycle completions, and fulfillment starts visible instead of hiding them in logs."},"aggs":[]}

attributes.title: JJ-N Funnel KPIs
attributes.visState:
{"title":"JJ-N Funnel KPIs","type":"markdown","params":{"markdown":"# JJ-N Funnel KPIs

Recommended metric formulas:
- Researched accounts = count of `account_researched`
- Reply rate = `reply_received / message_sent`
- Meeting rate = `meeting_booked / reply_received`
- Proposal rate = `proposal_sent / meeting_booked`
- Closed won revenue = sum of `payload.revenue` where `event.action : "outcome_recorded"` and `payload.is_revenue_realized : true`
- Gross margin = sum of `payload.gross_margin` where `payload.is_revenue_realized : true`
- Time to first dollar = first closed won outcome minus first `account_researched` timestamp

Use `payload.review_latency_hours`, `payload.fulfillment_status`, and `payload.gross_margin_pct` for operational drilldowns."},"aggs":[]}

attributes.title: JJ-N Recent Events Table
attributes.visState:
{"title":"JJ-N Recent Events Table","type":"markdown","params":{"markdown":"# JJ-N Recent Events Table

Recommended Discover columns:
- `@timestamp`
- `labels.engine`
- `labels.pipeline_stage`
- `event.action`
- `event.outcome`
- `entity.type`
- `entity.id`
- `payload.account_id`
- `payload.opportunity_id`
- `payload.reviewed_by`
- `payload.fulfillment_status`
- `payload.gross_margin_pct`

Sort newest first and pin a filter for `event.dataset : "elastifund.nontrading"`. This keeps approval decisions, cycle completions, and fulfillment transitions in one deterministic audit trail."},"aggs":[]}

attributes.title: JJ-N Approval And Fulfillment Coverage
attributes.visState:
{"title":"JJ-N Approval And Fulfillment Coverage","type":"markdown","params":{"markdown":"# JJ-N Approval And Fulfillment Coverage

Recommended companion views:
- Approval decisions: filter `event.action : "approval_decision"` and chart `payload.review_latency_hours`
- Fulfillment states: filter `event.action : "fulfillment_status_changed"` and split by `event.outcome` or `payload.fulfillment_status`
- Cycle summaries: filter `event.action : "cycle_complete"` and inspect `payload.reply_rate`, `payload.proposal_rate`, and `payload.outcome_rate`

This panel exists to confirm that JJ-N now exposes approval latency, fulfillment movement, and cycle-level funnel quality in the same event stream."},"aggs":[]}

attributes.title: JJ-N Non-Trading Revenue Funnel
attributes.description: Phase 0 non-trading funnel coverage for JJ-N: funnel stages, daily event volume, KPI formulas, recent events, and approval plus fulfillment visibility.
